title: verbascum × phoeniceiforme
intro: Verbascum × phoeniceiforme, also known as Phoenicea Mule or Verbascum phoeniceum hybrid, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × phoeniceiforme include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
